title: Line Chart Messages
description: Interface for customizable messages displayed in line chart empty states

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Canonical TypeScript definition of the line chart messages interface.

props.name: noData
props.description: Message shown when no data is available

props.name: noDataHelp
props.description: Help text shown when no data is available
props.default: 'Please provide data to display the chart'

props.name: allHidden
props.description: Message shown when all series are hidden

props.name: allHiddenHelp
props.description: Help text shown when all series are hidden
props.default: 'Click legend items to show series in the chart'
